dict.string: coinceeper needs camera access to scan QR codes for secure cryptocurrency transactions. For example: scanning wallet addresses to send payments, scanning payment request QR codes, and importing wallet seed phrases. This ensures accurate and secure transfer of cryptocurrency without manual typing errors.

coinceeper needs photo library access to save QR code images of your wallet addresses and transaction receipts for your records. For example: saving a QR code of your wallet address to share with others for receiving payments.

coinceeper needs permission to save wallet QR codes and transaction receipts to your photo library for easy sharing and record keeping. For example: saving your wallet address QR code to share with others.

coinceeper uses Face ID to securely authenticate access to your cryptocurrency wallet and authorize transactions. For example: unlocking the app to view your balance or confirming a payment before sending cryptocurrency.
coinceeper uses biometric authentication to securely protect your cryptocurrency wallet and authorize transactions. For example: using Touch ID or Face ID to unlock the app and confirm payments.

coinceeper needs notification permission to alert you about important cryptocurrency events. For example: transaction confirmations, price alerts, security notifications, and wallet balance updates to keep you informed about your digital assets.
